series_metadata.series_description: Includes application materials and supporting documentation for individual applications, including, but not limited to, eligibility information, inspections, payments, denials, appeals, and other documents filed with and related to the applicant.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: FEDERAL PROGRAMS: three (3) years closeout of file, or three (3) years date of denial unfunded/unsuccessful applications NON-FEDERAL PROGRAMS: two (2) years closeout of file, or (2) years date of denial unfunded/unsuccessful applications, . Statutory or regulatory provisions applicable certain programs may affect retention of related records. In such cases, statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
